title: OptiCOV (Ideathon)
subtitle: To encourage innovative thinking and problem-solving among students by developing ideas to address challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic.
description: OptiCOV was an ideathon organized by BVP OSA where participants were invited to propose creative and practical solutions related to the COVID-19 situation. The event provided a platform for students to apply their knowledge and contribute ideas toward tackling real-world problems during the pandemic.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Ideation and submission of innovative solutions related to COVID-19
Evaluation of ideas based on creativity, feasibility, and impact
Ideathon format encouraging innovation and research-based thinking
